kqlQuery.description: A valid kql query to filter the SLO with

size.description: The page size to use for cursor-based pagination, must be greater or equal than 1

searchAfter.description: The cursor to use for fetching the results from, when using a cursor-base pagination.

page.description: The page to use for pagination, must be greater or equal than 1

perPage.description: Number of SLOs returned by page

hideStale.description: Hide stale SLOs from the list as defined by stale SLO threshold in SLO settings
